name: atasnalar-bootstrap
description: This Sass is based on Bootstrap ^5.3.0.

scripts.compress: minify css/atasnalar-bootstrap.css > css/atasnalar-bootstrap.min.css && minify css/atasnalar-bootstrap-rtl.css > css/atasnalar-bootstrap-rtl.min.css && minify css/social-share.css > css/social-share.min.css && minify css/an-popup.css > css/an-popup.min.css && minify js/bootstrap.bundle.js > js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js && minify js/social-share.js > js/social-share.min.js && minify js/an-popup.js > js/an-popup.min.js && minify js/an-form.js > js/an-form.min.js

author: Atas Nalar <atasnalar@gmail.com>
